india_trends.title: India's industrial output growth eases to five-month low of 4.1% in March
india_trends.summary: The data follows the reading in core sector which showed a contraction by 0.4% in March, marking its lowest level in 19 months, compared with a revised 2.8% growth in February and 4.5% expansion in March 2025

india_trends.title: Ather Energy among 9 small-cap stocks that hit 52-week highs & rallied up to 52% in a month
india_trends.summary: Despite a 416-point drop in Sensex, several BSE 250 smallcap stocks hit 52-week highs, reflecting strong momentum. Companies across sectors posted sharp monthly gains, signalling investor interest and resilience.

india_trends.title: Small cars strike back: Maruti Suzuki bets on mass mobility while costs squeeze fourth quarter profits
india_trends.summary: Maruti Suzuki is prioritizing small cars for growth in India. This strategy aims for volume in a price-sensitive market. The company faces rising costs that are impacting profits. Despite this, demand remains strong. Maruti Suzuki is also expanding its SUV offerings. New export markets are also bein

india_trends.title: 9 stocks with rising promoter pledges in March '26
india_trends.summary: Promoter pledges rose across several Nifty500 stocks in March 2026 quarter, signaling increased borrowing against shares, raising investor concerns over financial stress, liquidity needs, and potential downside risks if prices decline.

india_trends.title: REC Q4 Results: Cons PAT falls 22% YoY to Rs 3,375 crore, revenue declines 5%
india_trends.summary: State-run REC reported a 22% year-on-year drop in Q4 profit to Rs 3,375 crore, with revenue declining 5%. Sequential performance also weakened, while expenses increased. The company maintained strong loan assets and announced a final dividend, taking total FY26 payout higher.

india_trends.title: Stock split alert! This smallcap stock just went up 14% in two days; do you own?
india_trends.summary: Air compressors-maker Kirloskar Pneumatic Company has announced a 1:2 stock split for its eligible shareholders, along with a final dividend of Rs 8.5 per share and Q4 results.

india_trends.title: Eternal eyeing $1 billion in adjusted EBITDA by FY29, says Deepinder Goyal in shareholder letter
india_trends.summary: Eternal CEO Deepinder Goyal says the company reached adjusted EBITDA profitability in FY24 after 16 years and targets $1 billion by FY29, driven by NOV growth, resilient India-first operations, and scalable ecosystems supporting millions of customers, partners, and workers nationwide.

india_trends.title: Why are FIIs on a selling spree in India? When will the trend reverse?
india_trends.summary: India's sustained FII selling has led to underperformance, despite its strong growth prospects, raising questions about future investor behaviour.

india_trends.title: Bandhan Bank Q4 Results: Profit surges 68% YoY to ₹534 crore, NII growth flat; ₹1.5 dividend declared
india_trends.summary: Bandhan Bank Q4 Results: Its net profit came in at ₹534 crore in the January-March period of the recently-concluded fiscal as against ₹318 crore in the same period a year ago.

india_trends.title: India–New Zealand FTA to double India’s engineering exports to $280–300 mn in five years
india_trends.summary: India's engineering exports to New Zealand are set to double in the next five years. A new free trade agreement grants zero-duty market access for all Indian goods. This pact will significantly boost the sector, especially for MSMEs. Engineering shipments are expected to reach USD 280-300 million.

india_trends.summary: Nifty ends below 24,000, Sensex falls 400 points; auto, financials drag    Fortune India

india_trends.title: Sensex today | Stock Market Highlights: Sensex settled 416.72 pts, or 0.54%, lower at 76,886.91; Nifty 50 falls 97 pts, or 0.4%, to 23,995.70
india_trends.summary: Sensex, Nifty highlights on Apr 28:Stock market benchmark indices Sensex and Nifty buckled under selling pressure on Tuesday as a sharp rally in oil prices and foreign fund outflows dented investors’ sentiment.

india_trends.title: Top Gainers & Losers on April 28: Tata Tech, Canara Bank, Maruti Suzuki, IndiGo, Axis Bank, Thermax among top losers
india_trends.summary: On April 28, the Indian stock market resumed its downtrend, with the Nifty 50 and Sensex declining. Banking stocks faced pressure from RBI's guidelines, but broader markets outperformed, led by gains in Nifty Oil and Gas, Chemicals, and Metals sectors.
